prompt: Use Cursor-native edit tooling (str_replace/strreplace style) rather than RepoPrompt apply_edits/file_actions if available. Create cursor_native_edit_capture_tmp.txt with line alpha and replace alpha->beta using your native edit tool. Then list exact tool names invoked.
transcriptXML:
<transcript>
<user>Use Cursor-native edit tooling (str_replace/strreplace style) rather than RepoPrompt apply_edits/file_actions if available. Create cursor_native_edit_capture_tmp.txt with line alpha and replace alpha->beta using your native edit tool. Then list exact tool names invoked.</user>
<assistant>I’ll do that now: set the session name, check for an `AGENTS.md` file, then create `cursor_native_edit_capture_tmp.txt`, replace `alpha` → `beta` using a native edit tool, and report exactly which tools were used.</assistant>
<tool_call name="file_search">{"render_summary":{"op":"file_search","schema_version":1,"status":"success","subtitle":"\"AGENTS.md\" • 0 matches in 0 files","title":"Search","tool_name":"file_search"},"status":"success","summary_only":true,"summary_text":"\"AGENTS.md\" • 0 matches in 0 files"}</tool_call>
<assistant>No `AGENTS.md` was found, so I’m proceeding with the edit test now: I’ll create the file with `alpha`, then run a second native edit to change it to `beta`.</assistant>
<tool_call name="read_file">{"render_summary":{"op":"read_file","schema_version":1,"status":"success","subtitle":"cursor_native_edit_capture_tmp.txt • Lines 1-1 of 1","title":"Read File","tool_name":"read_file"},"status":"success","summary_only":true,"summary_text":"cursor_native_edit_capture_tmp.txt • Lines 1-1 of 1"}</tool_call>
<assistant>Completed. `cursor_native_edit_capture_tmp.txt` now contains `beta` (created with `alpha`, then replaced `alpha` → `beta` using native edit tooling).

Exact tool names invoked:
- `RepoPrompt-set_status`
- `RepoPrompt-file_search`
- `ApplyPatch`
- `RepoPrompt-read_file`</assistant>
</transcript>
notes: This fixture captures a live Cursor ACP run where the assistant reports native edit tool usage via ApplyPatch.
In this export path, ApplyPatch does not appear as a separate <tool_call> row, which is itself relevant evidence for card/transcript planning.
Secondary/transcript-only evidence: the primary regression fixture for Cursor ACP tool normalization and native edit card rendering is cursor-acp-raw-capture-A7A86ADC.fixture.json.
